name: Brine for Roasted Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a container large enough to hold the whole chicken.
2. Mix well.
3. Rinse the whole roasting chicken thoroughly, removing any giblets and loose parts from the cavity.
4. Submerge the chicken in the brine mixture and refrigerate for 18 to 24 hours.
5. Roast according to usual method.
